hallucinations.description: The paper references multiple papers with 2025 publication dates (Li et al. 2025, Chen et al. 2025) that do not exist and cannot be found in academic databases. These appear to be fabricated citations.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: 'Li, M., Zhou, X., and Wu, O. (2025). Delving Into the Training Dynamics for Image Classification.' and 'Chen, Y., Wang, Z., Baracaldo, N., Kadhe, S., and Yu, L. (2025). Evaluating the Dynamics of Membership Privacy in Deep Learning.'

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinated citations (nonexistent 2025 papers). Experimental results, methodology, and code execution logs are consistent and appear genuine with no evidence of faked data or incorrect technical claims.
